title: Databricks Runtime maintenance updates (03/10)
body:
New maintenance updates are available for supported Databricks Runtime versions. These updates include bug fixes, security patches, and performance improvements. For details, see:

* [Databricks Runtime 18.0](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/maintenance-updates#180)
* [Databricks Runtime 17.3 LTS](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/maintenance-updates#173)
* [Databricks Runtime 17.2](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/maintenance-updates-archive#172)
* [Databricks Runtime 16.4 LTS](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/maintenance-updates#164)
* [Databricks Runtime 15.4 LTS](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/maintenance-updates#154)
* [Databricks Runtime 14.3 LTS](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/maintenance-updates#143)
* [Databricks Runtime 13.3 LTS](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/maintenance-updates#133)
